title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: server.py:6 imports `from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP` and data_loader.py:4 imports pandas, but no requirements.txt/pyproject.toml/setup.py exists in the run. A fresh checkout cannot install or run the server; the archive's scores.json is all-zeros precisely because `mcp` was unavailable in a clean env.
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning at least `mcp` and `pandas` so the server is reproducibly installable.

title: Tests do not all pass (test_coverage=0.96, defect_rate=0.905)
evidence: retort.db completed row: test_coverage=0.96, defect_rate=0.905 — tests ran (gate passed) but a small fraction failed or coverage <100%. Cannot pinpoint which: data/kaggle/ is not archived, so the suite cannot be re-run locally.
suggestion: Re-run pytest in an env with mcp + the Kaggle CSVs to identify and fix the ~4% of failing/uncovered cases.

title: Archive scores.json is degenerate all-zeros, conflicting with canonical DB scores
evidence: scores.json = {code_quality:0, test_coverage:0, ...} (all 0.0), but retort.db completed row shows code_quality=0.667, test_coverage=0.96. code_quality=0.0 is impossible for this clean static code, so scores.json reflects a re-eval in an env missing the `mcp` dep + data/, not the real result.
suggestion: Regenerate scores.json in an environment with mcp + data/kaggle/ present, or treat the DB completed row as authoritative.

title: data/kaggle/ datasets not present in the run archive
evidence: No data/ directory in run_dir; data_loader.py:9 expects DATA_DIR = ./data/kaggle/*.csv. Expected (large datasets are not archived), but it prevents local re-run.
suggestion: None required — note for reviewers that local verification needs the Kaggle CSVs restored to data/kaggle/.

title: Four query tools beyond the 12 required capabilities
evidence: server.py exposes list_teams (590), get_player_details (623), get_team_seasons (674), get_biggest_wins (475) in addition to the required match/team/player/standings/stats/H2H tools.
suggestion: None — useful additions; surfaced for cross-run comparison, not a deduction.
